sourceMovie.title: Hellboy II: The Golden Army
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Hellboy II: The Golden Army works as a fantasy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The fantasy and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Thor
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hellboy II: The Golden Army clicked for you, Thor (2011) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Hellboy II: The Golden Army?
faq.answer: Try Thor, Thor: The Dark World, Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings—each shares DNA with Hellboy II: The Golden Army while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Hellboy II: The Golden Army?
faq.answer: Hellboy II: The Golden Army (2008) is best described as Fantasy, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Hellboy II: The Golden Army part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Hellboy Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
